Redgum Energy Ltd (ACN: 00x–7 5 2–11, fictional) — DPA Schedule: AU Privacy Act & Corporations Act alignment for HR, payroll, and investor-relations datasets; contact: privacy@redgumenergy.au, +61 2 5550 8190.
Roles: Redgum Energy Ltd as APP entity; Horizon Payroll Services Pty Ltd as processor; controls include APP 1–13 and ASIC/ASX context; no MNPI exported—draft ASX Listing Rule 3.1 materials are explicitly excluded.
Scope of data: employment files (EmpID AU-9X3*47), limited health clearance outcome (“fit for duty”), and credit-report headers; minimisation applied to remove raw medical notes and full bureau files.
Consent log: onboarding consent recorded 03/02/2026 (IP 203.0.113.77); Mr. Arlo Finch withdrew consent for marketing emails on 29/03/2026 via dsar+au@redgumenergy.au; withdrawal acknowledged, n o n e of the HR processing relies on consent.
DSAR event: access request received 01/04/2026 under APP 12; copy provided 05/04/2026 at https://portal.redgumenergy.au/dsar?req=RGE-4 9 3—O (token expires); correction request under APP 13 closed with address update.
Erasure event: non-essential recruitment profile deleted 08/04/2026 (Case No. DSAR—Syd—00 7); r e d a c t e d references retained to meet Corporations Act s286 7‑year recordkeeping—this is a completed action.
Cross‑border transfer: payroll line items sent to Southern Byte Pte Ltd (SG) for processing; APP 8 considered; contractual measures ensure comparable protections; transfer approval memo TRA‑71‑SG archived at http://export.redgumenergy.au/api/v1/xfer?id=TRA-7 1 SG&sig=9b%2Fkz.
Data‑export approval was granted by Ms. Tahlia Vance, Privacy Lead, on 12/03/2026 (tahlia.vance@redgumenergy.au), and expired on 30/05/2026; this approval is not presently active and no live transfers are scheduled.
Subprocessor register: Cloud Koala NZ Ltd (Wellington) for encrypted backups; no biometric templates or device MAC addresses are collected, and hotspot logs were proposed but not implemented.
Market integrity statement: investor‑relations workspace contains only public‑source ASX announcements and shareholder FAQs; no “not generally available” forecasts or draft board papers are transmitted to vendors under this schedule.
Retention controls: pre‑employment health screening outcomes kept 12 months, then summary “pass/fail” only; Retention Job RG‑RJ‑2 1 0 ran 09/05/2026 (LogRef: 0xA9‑OCR‑1 3), removing CV attachments from 2024.
Access control: least‑privilege role hr_view‑min applied; break‑glass access required CFO approval and was not used in Q2 FY26.
Security summary: transit TLS1.3; at rest AES‑256; audit trail exported weekly to SplinterVault AU region; no key material is held by offshore vendors.
Credit data note: only header fields (score band, date) ingested; full bureau files remain with FairRidge Credit Pty Ltd; marketing suppression list updated post‑withdrawal.
Policy‑only control: a template for bulk PI deletion exists for contingency events but was already executed for legacy test accounts in 2025; there is no outstanding deletion backlog.
